UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Jason's confidence and expansion as he stands on the cliff, wands planted, ships sailing in the horizon.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the details of the image, focusing instead on the overall sense of strategic planning and ambitious journey.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Three of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, ethereal, optimistic, expansive, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the ambitious drive of the Babel planners, their overreaching plans, and the unfinished ziggurat symbolizing incomplete aspirations.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the chaos or arrogance depicted in the image. Instead, focus on the potential and determination embodied by the Babel planners.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Three of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Ambient, Strings, Harp, Reversed, Melancholic, Introspective, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Three of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Marco Polo's exploration, the camel caravan, and the distant silk tents as symbols of long-term planning and far-reaching ventures.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the weathered face or grit, focusing instead on the journey and its potential for success.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Three of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, violin, flute, strings ensemble, hopeful, uplifting, expanding, instrumental
